newsitems.title: 10,000 Wishlists!
newsitems.author: Seanyp
newsitems.contents: 10,000 wishlists — thank you!We're SO excited to see how many of you can't wait to hop into the kitchen and become a Void Chef. It's been an amazing first 48 hours since our announcement, and it's all thanks to you!We’re deep in development and have a lot more to share as the game comes together: more creatures, more cooking, more dismemberment, and more of this strange little world we’re building.If you’ve already wishlisted Elderfeast, thank you so much! If you know someone who might want to become a Void Chef, sharing the Steam page helps us a ton.From all of us at Lurker Entertainment, thank you! Let's keep cooking!
